GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Dreaming of a career in health? Here's how one Torrens University Australia graduate achieved that goal", "Georgie Collinson on studying Health at SSNT at Torrens University Australia.", "The saying "if you love what you do, you'll never work a day in your life," is one of the keys to having a successful and fulfilling career. And for naturopath, nutritionist, self-titled 'anxiety mindset coach', and SSNT at Torrens University Australia graduate, Georgie Collinson, these words certainly ring true thanks in large part to her studies in Health at Torrens University. The Bachelor of Health Science graduate had an interest in naturopathy as a career but originally thought, as she shared with Vogue, that there were limited options for how that career would look. But, with her passion for health and after researching the Bachelor of Health Science at SSNT at Torrens University, her future suddenly seemed a lot brighter. "When I first came across the idea of becoming a naturopath, I thought my options for my career were rather limited. It would be likely that I'd either work in a clinic run by someone else, or I would start my own [clinic]," Collinson shared with Vogue. The Bachelor of Health Science graduate added that her dream role didn't even exist at the time. "The idea of operating online location-independent, with flexible hours and such a varied role that I created myself was not yet in existence. Getting to the place where I am working with clients over Zoom, running the Anxiety Reset Podcast, creating video content and my online program Reset Your Anxious Mind In 90 Days has really been a gradual process of blindly hoping and following the next step, as I created this dream life for myself. I didn't know how it was all going to unfold when I began. But my passion for health and wellbeing spurred me on regardless. It was something I couldn't explain, a calling within me to seek my purpose. I just knew there was a reason I felt so much excitement when I read the subject headlines for my Bachelor of Health Science in Naturopathy [at SSNT at Torrens University Australia]." "Little did I know I'd end up running a business 100 per cent online, predominantly through Instagram, completely flipping the traditional naturopathic business model on its head. Now I help high-achieving women stop using their coping mechanisms like food and alcohol to manage their anxiety, so that life doesn't just look good on Instagram, but actually feels as good in real life as it appears too," Collinson continued. "The truth is, in my pursuit of knowledge at SSNT [at Torrens University Australia], I was seeking solutions for my own mental health and anxiety. I wanted to heal myself, and hoped one day I'd be able to help others with what I'd learnt. For numerous reasons, the conventional approach to managing mental health never suited me." Studying Health at SSNT at Torrens University Australia not only paved the way for Collinson to develop a different and effective approach for managing her own mental health, but it also provided her with the practical skills and belief in herself to set up her revolutionary business and help others. "Through my time at SSNT [at Torrens University Australia], I discovered my own system of healing for myself, which has formed part of the early structure for what I now call the Anxiety Reset Method, my whole mind-body approach to managing anxiety. The knowledge foundation I was provided with in my studies definitely gave me the confidence I needed to go forth into the world knowing I could really make a big difference in people's lives." If you have a passion for health and wellness, studying one of the many Health courses (think: Naturopathy, Nutrition, Counselling and Community Services, Public Health, Beauty and Dermal Therapies, and Sports Development) at Torrens University Australia, like Collinson, is the ideal option to set you on the path towards loving what you do. And, with flexible online and blended learning, there's not only an applicable course for aspiring health industry professionals, there's also a study option that will work for you. Find more information on Health courses at Torrens University, here."
